title: 🧠 Symbolic Bifurcation
name: Symbolic Bifurcation
what_it_is: Bifurcation as metaphor: a single path splitting into symbolically charged trajectories—used in chaos theory and metaphysics alike.
how_to_use: a sigil of bifurcation unfolds in light—each path represents a soul trajectory
her crown fractalizes into bifurcated glyphs—forked symbols of choice and fate
animation_behavior: Unfolding logic trees, glowing rune-branches, binary forked pulses ---
